tracks.meaning: a distinct level or tier in a hierarchical software architecture or system design
a sheet-like body of rock or sediment with distinct characteristics, typically horizontal or gently sloping
a single thickness or course of material applied to a surface, such as paint, plaster, or insulation
a sheet or membrane of tissue that covers or lines a structure in the body
one of several levels of a component or system stacked vertically, such as network layers in communication protocols
a group of hens kept together for egg production on a poultry farm
to place something in layers or to arrange something in stacked levels
to wear multiple pieces of clothing on top of one another for warmth or style
a distinct level of ingredients in a layered dish such as a cake or salad
a sheet of clouds or atmospheric gases at a particular altitude
one of multiple passes of ink or color applied to a surface during the printing process
a person who lays or places something, particularly in construction or installation work
